response: Upanishad kehte hain, ichha kabhi khatam nahi hoti. Jab tum unhe observe karna seekh jaate ho, tab control aata hai.

instruction: Why do we get angry easily?
response: Gita ke anusaar, gussa adhuri ichha se janam leta hai. Jab expectations kam hoti hain, shanti badhti hai.
Chanakya kehte hain, mann ko majboot banana hi sabse badi jeet hai. Bahar ki jeet baad mein aati hai.

instruction: What is the value of time?
response: Samay sabse bada shikshak hai. Jo use samajh leta hai, woh jeevan ko sahi disha deta hai.
Jahan tumhara dhyaan jaata hai, wahin tumhari energy jaati hai. Focus ko protect karna hi growth hai.
Ramayana mein jeevan ki saralta hi Ram ki sabse badi shakti thi. Simplicity clarity deti hai.
Aalochana tumhe todti nahi, sudharne ka mauka deti hai. Agar sahi use karo toh wahi tumhari strength ban jaati hai.
Upanishad kehte hain, 'Tat Tvam Asi' — tum wahi ho jise tum dhoond rahe ho. Khud ko pehchanna hi sabse bada gyaan hai.
Badlav se darr tab lagta hai jab hum stability ko pakad kar rakhte hain. Lekin jeevan ka niyam hi badlav hai.
Shant mann sabse sahi faisle leta hai. Jab emotions control mein hote hain, clarity badh jaati hai.
Asli shakti tab dikhti hai jab tum mushkil waqt mein bhi toot-te nahi ho. Yeh andar se aati hai.
Pressure tab lagta hai jab hum outcome par zyada focus karte hain. Process par dhyaan do, pressure kam ho jayega.
Jahan samajh kam aur expectation zyada hoti hai, wahan rishte dheere dheere toot jaate hain.
Consistency motivation se nahi, discipline se aati hai. Roz thoda karna hi asli jeet hai.
Khushi bahar ki cheez nahi hai. Jab tum accept karna seekh jaate ho, tab khushi apne aap aati hai.

instruction: How to let go of past?
response: Jo beet gaya usse pakad ke rakhna dard badhata hai. Chhod dena hi aage badhne ka pehla step hai.
Har beej ko ped banne mein samay lagta hai. Jaldi karne se prakriya nahi badalti.
Jab tum dusron se compare karte ho, tab jalan aati hai. Apne raaste par dhyaan do.
Clarity tab aati hai jab tum apne mann ki awaaz sunte ho, na ki duniya ki.
Overthinking tab hoti hai jab hum control chahte hain. Jab tum trust karte ho, thoughts calm ho jaate hain.

instruction: How to stay calm in problems?
response: Krishna ne battlefield mein bhi Arjun ko shant rehna sikhaya. Situation nahi, tumhari soch matter karti hai.

instruction: What is the importance of truth?
response: Sach hamesha seedha hota hai. Jhooth ko sambhalna padta hai, sach apne aap tikta hai.
Confidence action se aata hai. Jitna tum karte ho, utna hi tum par vishwas badhta hai.
Jab tum apni value ko dusron ke approval se jod dete ho, tab insecurity badhti hai.
Sirf knowledge nahi, sahi samay par sahi faisla lena hi asli buddhi hai.
Emotions ko control nahi, samajhna seekho. Samajh aate hi balance aata hai.
Discipline mushkil lagta hai kyunki woh comfort ke against hota hai. Lekin wahi growth deta hai.
Life kabhi predictable nahi hoti. Jo uncertain ko accept karta hai, wahi aage badhta hai.

instruction: What is the meaning of effort?
response: Prayas ka matlab sirf mehnat nahi, sahi disha mein mehnat hai.

instruction: How to find direction in life?
response: Direction tab milta hai jab tum khud se honest hote ho. Dusron ka raasta tumhara nahi hota.
Samay aur anubhav har kisi ko badalte hain. Change natural hai, usse accept karo.
Jab tum apni boundaries set karte ho, tab self-respect grow hota hai.
Attachment ka matlab pakad lena hai. Jab pakad chhodte ho, tab freedom milti hai.
Focus distractions ko hataane se aata hai, aur distractions tumhari choice hoti hain.
Kabhi kabhi chup rehna sabse bada jawab hota hai. Silence clarity deta hai.
Bar bar girna failure nahi, ruk jaana failure hai. Seekh ke uthte rehna hi jeet hai.
Apne mann ko control karna hi sabse bada control hai. Bahar ki cheezein baad mein aati hain.
Restlessness tab aati hai jab mann present mein nahi hota. Ya past ya future mein bhatak raha hota hai.
Anubhav + soch = wisdom. Sirf experience se nahi, us par sochne se wisdom aata hai.

instruction: What is the role of karma?
response: Karma tumhare actions ka result hai. Jo tum karte ho, wahi tumhare paas laut kar aata hai.
Chinta tab hoti hai jab hum control se bahar cheezon par focus karte hain. Jo control mein hai, us par dhyaan do.
Darr ke bawajood aage badhna hi courage hai. Darr ka na hona nahi.
Apne thoughts ko observe karo. Jo zaroori nahi, unhe chhod do.
Stuck tab feel hota hai jab hum change se darte hain. Ek chhota step bhi movement laata hai.
Chhote chhote decisions khud lene se trust build hota hai. Practice se confidence aata hai.
Jab tum accept karte ho ki sab kuch tumhare control mein nahi hai, tab shanti milti hai.
Positive rehna matlab reality ignore karna nahi. Matlab har situation mein seekhna.
Doubt tab aata hai jab hum apne past failures ko yaad rakhte hain aur growth ko ignore karte hain.
Growth comfort zone ke bahar hoti hai. Jab tum risk lete ho, tab badhte ho.
Success mindset ka matlab hai har situation ko opportunity ki tarah dekhna.
